channel.title: Pension on The Tradewinds Brief
channel.description: Recent content in Pension on The Tradewinds Brief

item.title: Auntie Cheryl - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Auntie Cheryl from Chaguanas weighs in: the pension news is wonderful, the crime is down, the Prime Minister is standing up to CARICOM, and yes the police station thing was upsetting but Madam Prime Minister is handling it. Everything is going to be alright.

item.title: Trini Dispatch - Monday, April 20, 2026
item.description: Port of Spain view: a municipal police corporal was murdered inside the San Fernando station and over 4,000 rounds of ammunition walked out the door. The Prime Minister says no curfew is needed. The Prime Minister also says you are safer. Both statements were issued Saturday.
